SELECT lat, lng FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Silverstone Circuit'
SELECT circuitRef FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Marina Bay Street Circuit'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.client_id) FROM "client" AS T1 JOIN "district" AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' AND T1.birth_date < '1950-01-01' AND T2.A2 = 'Sokolov'

SELECT T4.A2 FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T1.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T3.gender = 'F' AND T3.birth_date = '1976-01-29'

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.gender = 'M' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.client_id) * 100 AS percentage_male_clients FROM district AS T1 JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.A3 = 'south Bohemia' AND T1.A4 = (SELECT CAST(A4 AS INTEGER) FROM district WHERE A3 = 'south Bohemia' ORDER BY CAST(A4 AS INTEGER) DESC LIMIT 1)

WITH first_loan_client AS (
    SELECT T1.account_id
    FROM loan AS T1
    JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
    WHERE T1.status = 'A' AND T1.date = '1993-07-05'
    ORDER BY T1.date ASC
    LIMIT 1
), 
balance_1993 AS (
    SELECT balance
    FROM trans
    WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM first_loan_client)
      AND date = '1993-03-22'
    ORDER BY date DESC
    LIMIT 1
), 
balance_1998 AS (
    SELECT balance
    FROM trans
    WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM first_loan_client)
      AND date = '1998-12-27'
    ORDER BY date DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT (CAST((SELECT balance FROM balance_1998) - (SELECT balance FROM balance_1993) AS REAL) / (SELECT balance FROM balance_1993)) * 100 AS increase_rate
SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'A' THEN amount END) AS REAL) / SUM(amount)) * 100 FROM loan
SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'C' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(amount)) * 100 FROM "loan" WHERE amount < 100000

SELECT d.A2, ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increment FROM loan AS l JOIN account AS a ON l.account_id = a.account_id JOIN district AS d ON a.district_id = d.district_id WHERE l.status = 'D' AND d.A12 IS NOT NULL AND d.A12 <> 0
SELECT d.A2, COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id) AS female_holders FROM district d JOIN client c ON c.district_id = d.district_id WHERE c.gender = 'F' GROUP BY d.A2 ORDER BY female_holders DESC LIMIT 9

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loan AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T2.frequency = 'POPLATEK MESICNE' AND T1.status = 'APPROVED' AND T1.amount >= 250000 AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'

SELECT d.A2 FROM trans AS t JOIN account AS a ON t.account_id = a.account_id JOIN district AS d ON a.district_id = d.district_id WHERE t.type = 'VYDAJ' AND t.date LIKE '1996-01%' AND t.amount IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.amount DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.account_id) FROM loan AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.status IN ('C', 'D') AND T2.district_id = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM client AS c JOIN district AS d ON c.district_id = d.district_id JOIN (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A15 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(A15 AS REAL) DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) AS t ON d.district_id = t.district_id WHERE c.gender = 'M'

SELECT DISTINCT T1.client_id FROM client AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN card AS T3 ON T2.disp_id = T3.disp_id JOIN trans AS T4 ON T2.account_id = T4.account_id WHERE T4.type = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND T4.amount < (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM trans WHERE type = 'VYBER KARTOU') AND strftime('%Y', T4.date) = '1998'
SELECT T1.frequency FROM account AS T1 JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.frequency != 'OWNER' AND T2.A11 > 8000 AND T2.A11 <= 9000 GROUP BY T1.frequency
SELECT AVG(CAST(A15 AS REAL)) FROM district WHERE A15 > 4000 AND district_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT district_id FROM account WHERE strftime('%Y', date) >= '1997')
SELECT T1.trans_id FROM trans AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.operation = 'VYBER' AND T2.client_id = 3356

SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T4.gender = 'F' THEN T4.client_id END) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T4.client_id) * 100 FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T4 ON T2.client_id = T4.client_id JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T3.A11 > 10000

SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', loan.date) = '1997' THEN loan.amount END) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', loan.date) = '1996' THEN loan.amount END) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', loan.date) = '1996' THEN loan.amount END),0)) * 100.0 AS growth_rate FROM loan JOIN account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id JOIN disp ON disp.account_id = account.account_id JOIN client ON disp.client_id = client.client_id WHERE client.gender = 'M' AND strftime('%Y', loan.date) IN ('1996','1997')
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trans WHERE account_id = 3 AND type = 'statement') AS request_count, (SELECT k_symbol FROM trans WHERE amount = 3539 AND k_symbol IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1) AS aim

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 FROM (SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, c.gender FROM client AS c JOIN disp AS d ON d.client_id = c.client_id JOIN account AS a ON a.account_id = d.account_id WHERE a.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE') AS sub

SELECT a.account_id FROM "account" AS a JOIN "disp" AS d ON a.account_id = d.account_id JOIN "client" AS c ON d.client_id = c.client_id JOIN "district" AS di ON c.district_id = di.district_id WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM "client" WHERE gender = 'F' AND birth_date IS NOT NULL) AND di.A11 = (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM "district" WHERE A11 IS NOT NULL)
SELECT AVG(CAST(l.amount AS REAL)) FROM loan AS l WHERE l.status IN ('C','D') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM trans t WHERE t.account_id = l.account_id AND t.operation = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU')

SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(c.birth_date))/365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age FROM "client" AS c JOIN "disp" AS d ON c.client_id = d.client_id JOIN "card" AS cr ON d.disp_id = cr.disp_id WHERE d.type = 'OWNER' AND cr.type = 'gold'

SELECT T1.account_id, T3.A2, T3.A3 FROM account AS T1 JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id JOIN trans AS T4 ON T1.account_id = T4.account_id JOIN `order` AS T5 ON T1.account_id = T5.account_id WHERE strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '1993' AND T5.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU' AND T1.date > T4.date GROUP BY T1.account_id, T3.A2, T3.A3

SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31' AND T4.A3 = 'east Bohemia'
